description: Config for direct-URL block-based schedule pages. This file does not change Enrollware course IDs or appointment URL behavior.

course_id_notes.344085: Routine public AHA Heartsaver CPR AED in-person course. Use for public in-person CPR/AED scheduler routing.
course_id_notes.209808: Routine public AHA Heartsaver CPR AED blended/online plus skills course. Use for public blended CPR/AED scheduler routing.
course_id_notes.460465: Reserved for Fire Department/public-safety partner programs only ($0 class with optional public participant card fee). Do not use for routine public Heartsaver CPR AED routing.

uscg-first-aid-cpr-aed.title: USCG-Approved First Aid / CPR / AED
uscg-first-aid-cpr-aed.subtitle: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Total — AMERHA-216
uscg-first-aid-cpr-aed.meta_description: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Total options for captain's license, OUPV, Master, and Merchant Mariner Credential applicants who need AMERHA-216 USCG documentation.
uscg-first-aid-cpr-aed.intro: Select the AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED format, then choose a public date and start time.
uscg-first-aid-cpr-aed.explanation: This page is a local cover page for mariners and captain's license applicants. It uses the same real AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED classes already available through 910CPR; it does not create separate USCG classroom inventory.

documentation_note.title: USCG documentation path
documentation_note.body: Students who complete all required sections can receive the AHA course completion card and AMERHA-216 USCG documentation for the First Aid / CPR / AED requirement.
bullets: For captain's license, OUPV, Master, and Merchant Mariner Credential applicants.
Complete every required AMERHA-216 section for the documentation path.
Bring photo ID and tell the instructor you need USCG/mariner documentation.

uscg-first-aid-cpr-aed.student_note: The blended option is online learning plus an in-person skills session, so students still attend the scheduled skills session.

USCG_AHA_HEARTSAVER_FIRST_AID_CPR_AED.label: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Total options

course_options.display_label: In-person AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED
course_options.clarification: Classroom AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Total path for USCG/AMERHA-216 documentation.
Blended AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Total path for USCG/AMERHA-216 documentation.

course_id_notes.209809: Routine public AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED in-person course used for the USCG/AMERHA-216 cover page.
course_id_notes.329495: Routine public AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED blended course used for the USCG/AMERHA-216 cover page.
course_id_notes.460465: Reserved for Fire Department/public-safety partner programs only. Do not use for this public USCG cover page.
